title: Cyrtochilum llanachagaense
taxonomy: Cyrtochilum llanachagaense is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Cyrtochilum, a group of orchids that are native to the Americas. Cyrtochilum llanachagaense is further classified as a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Maxillarieae. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and genetic characteristics. Cyrtochilum llanachagaense is a unique and fascinating species within the Orchidaceae family.
